existing_bullets: Architected production-ready LLM-agnostic knowledge management system (8825 PCMS v2.0.0) enabling seamless context portability across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Windsurf through innovative single-file architecture.

Designed comprehensive protocol framework consisting of 4 core systems: confidence-based decision-making (mathematical formula), adaptive learning, two-stage knowledge mining, and zero-configuration content generation with <30 second target.

Identified and validated blue ocean market opportunity by creating new 'Hiring Manager Intelligence Tools' category through systematic competitive analysis and market gap identification for Trustybits project.

Designed innovative three-profile hiring blueprint system (Conventional, Adjacent/Transferable, High-Ceiling Wild Card) grounded in 6 scientific frameworks including Big Five (OCEAN), Belbin's Team Roles, and Psychological Safety research.

Created comprehensive adoption strategy with Google-like simplicity approach, zero behavior change design, and immediate utility focus, including 4 entry points and complete design sprint brief ready for execution.

Designed system to actively promote diversity through structured spectrum approach that focuses on team gaps rather than individual qualifications, providing explainable AI recommendations and reducing algorithmic bias.

Led complete system design and documentation effort, producing 19 files including master brain architecture, 4 core protocols, user profiles, and comprehensive guides achieving 94/100 documentation quality score.
Designed zero-configuration PromptGen workflow that generates professional portfolios in under 30 seconds with three style variants and audience-specific optimization for different user segments.
existing_8825_trustybits_content.assessment: Good coverage of 8825 PCMS and high-level Trustybits concept, but missing detailed Trustybits discovery journey, problem definition depth, go-to-market strategy specifics, and validation methodology
